jobs.title: Product Lead, AI-Native (Special Projects)
jobs.summary: Real page summary: build first versions of AI agents and multi-agent AI solutions, using LangGraph and leading-edge LLMs; combine product discovery, merchant pain-point research, AI-native product thinking, and hands-on system design across agent backends and user experience.

jobs.title: AI智能体与低代码平台 产品负责人

jobs.summary: Visible page evidence confirms a Shenzhen AI agent and low-code platform product lead role. The title and page context strongly indicate ownership over AI agent platform capabilities and low-code product direction, but the detailed JD body is partially hidden behind LinkedIn login prompts and should be enriched later if we keep it.
